name: claude-code-cli
description: Invoke Claude Code CLI as an external reviewer. Triggers: 'ask Claude Code to review my changes', 'get a second opinion from Claude', 'claude ultrareview', 'cross-project reflection'. Do NOT use for Codex (use codex-cli) or Cursor (use cursor-cli).

inspired_by.name: Claude Code CLI
inspired_by.author: Anthropic
inspired_by.contribution: The `claude` command-line agent this skill wraps: `claude -p` (print / non-interactive) with `--permission-mode plan` for a read-only review stance, `--model` / `--effort` / `--max-budget-usd` guardrails, `--output-format text`, and the `claude ultrareview` cloud multi-agent review subcommand. Because Claude Code has no native diff-review subcommand, the wrapper assembles the git diff itself and feeds it as prompt context.

metadata.catalog_summary: Drive the Claude Code CLI (`claude -p`) as a second-opinion reviewer — review working-tree, staged, or branch diffs read-only, get a second opinion on a decision, bug, or plan, run cross-project reflection, or hand off to a hosted `claude ultrareview`. Defaults to read-only and never bypasses permissions without an explicit ask.
